SettingsConfig.title: SettingsConfig
SettingsConfig.description: Global settings for the Masan Jungang Elementary School Special Room Reservation System.

copyright.description: Copyright notice displayed in the footer.

classes.description: List of available classes/teachers for reservations.

periods.description: List of school periods with start/end time and booking toggle.

DailyReservations.title: DailyReservations
DailyReservations.description: All classroom reservations made on a single, specific date, indexed by a composite key.

reservations.description: A map from room_period compound ID (e.g., 'roomName_periodId') to the reservation detail object.

/artifacts/classroom-reservation-79b25/p.description: Single config document defining rooms, periods, school description, classes and custom fields.
Daily bookings where dateStr is formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.
